name: dust-onnx-capacitor
description: Capacitor plugin for on-device ONNX Runtime model loading over .onnx files.
author: Rogelio Ruiz Perez

scripts.test:ios: npm run build && cd example && npm install && node test-e2e-ios.mjs
scripts.test:ios:verbose: npm run build && cd example && npm install && node test-e2e-ios.mjs --verbose
scripts.test:android: npm run build && cd example && npm install && node test-e2e-android.mjs
scripts.test:android:verbose: npm run build && cd example && npm install && node test-e2e-android.mjs --verbose
